commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
perf(infra): right-size Longhorn CPU guarantees from 12% to 3%

Instance-manager requested 1440m CPU (12% of 12-core node) but only uses
~91m. Reducing to 3% (360m) frees ~1080m of scheduler headroom on
foundry-core. Also adds explicit resource limits for longhornManager
in the ArgoCD inline values for consistency.

commit.message:
Initial Traefik setup for nyx

Traefik v3.2 with Let's Encrypt HTTP-01, Docker label discovery,
and file provider for host services. Certs stored in named volume.
Routes prettybird.zapplebee.online to nyx-entrypoint on :8080.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(unified): use module_integrity for L4 attestation level

The legacy file_integrity check treats server-only files (not present
on client) as "missing" and fails the check. The unified module_integrity
properly handles these by excluding them.

This fix:
- Updates L4 attestation to prefer module_integrity.valid
- Falls back to legacy file_integrity if module_integrity unavailable
- Updates degradation detection to use same logic

Fixes issue where 1140/1140 disk files matching registry still showed
"Issues Found" and 3/5 attestation due to 24 server-only files in manifest.

Bump to v1.1.18.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use Capacitor Geolocation plugin on native iOS + solid nav background

GPS: navigator.geolocation is unreliable in WKWebView. On native platforms,
use @capacitor/geolocation which surfaces proper iOS permission prompts and
uses CoreLocation directly. Web/PWA fallback unchanged.

Nav blur: backdrop-filter bleeds onto icons in WKWebView regardless of DOM
structure. Replace backdrop-blur with solid bg-[#0d2035]/90 — no blur source,
no bleed, icons render sharp at any opacity.

commit.message:
fix(deploy): use permanent PAT for GHCR auth instead of ephemeral GITHUB_TOKEN

GITHUB_TOKEN expires after the CI run, causing Nomad to fail pulling
the image on restarts. Override AUTH_PASSWORD with GHCR_READ_TOKEN
(a long-lived PAT with write:packages scope) so Nomad can always pull.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fd-read-char: use ffi-fdread instead of fdread (API mismatch)

Gerbil's fdread API: (fdread fd buf start end) -> count
Chez's fdread API:   (fdread fd count) -> bytevector

The compiled builtins.sls called fdread with 4 args (Gerbil style)
but Chez's fdread only accepts 2 args, causing arity errors on all
pipe-based reads: read -n, read in pipelines, etc.

Fix: use ffi-fdread which has consistent API on both platforms:
(ffi-fdread fd count) -> bytevector. Remove obsolete *fd-read-buf*.

Result: builtin-read 57/64 (was 42/64)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix refresh_index page matching to handle all CustomGPT API field formats

The old code only matched pages by p.filename which returned deleted: 0
because the API may return the identifier in p.page_url instead, or as
a basename rather than a full relative path.

Now tries filename and page_url against both relative path and basename,
plus suffix matching for URL-prefixed values.

commit.message:
Add project + subcontractor limits per tier to prevent consultant abuse (T147)

Closes loophole where a consulting firm could use one Business subscription
to manage 50+ clients as "projects" instead of using the Partner program.

New limits per tier:
- Essentials: 5 projects, 10 subcontractors
- Professional: 15 projects, 25 subcontractors
- Business: 30 projects, 50 subcontractors
- Enterprise: unlimited

Enforcement added to createProject and createSubcontractor server actions
with billing context checks. Upgrade messages mention Partner program.

New paid add-on for teams — AI-powered slideshow builder using Claude.
Brokers select style/theme/font/color, type slide content, and AI
generates a complete self-contained HTML presentation with team logo.
Includes fullscreen present mode, save/re-generate flow, and
team owner toggle in AI Tools settings.

- New presentations table + RLS (private only)

Complete redesign with staggered content animations (fadeUp per

textures, scale transitions, Google Fonts (Inter, Playfair Display,
JetBrains Mono), gradient border CTA cards, progress bar glow dot,
rounded glass nav buttons, and dramatically differentiated presets:

* fix: resolve Invalid JWT errors in presentation generator and edge functions

- generatePresentation retries once on 401 with a force-refreshed token

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: modern template redesign + wide logo + overlay controls

- Redesign all 4 style presets to be dramatically different:
  Modern: gradient text h1, 5px gradient accent bar, ambient orb title bg
  Classic: solid color h1, round dot bullets, full-width underlines
  Minimal: no accent bar, no h2 underline, ultra-thin faded bullets, extra padding
  Bold: 4.2em h1, 8px thick accent bar, immersive gradient title slide

- Improve slide transition from scale(.98) to translateY(20px) for smoother feel
- Agent CTA card gets backdrop-filter blur + 20px radius
- H2 underline widened to 48px accent bar
- Background overlay reworked: ::before for image + ::after for color tint
- Wide presentation logo preferred over square team logo
- Remove Brand (Gold/Amber) theme — Light and Dark only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: complete presentation template overhaul — premium design quality

Every style preset is now a completely different visual identity:

Modern — Glassmorphism + gradient mesh: floating color orbs on title
  slide, gradient text h1 with glow, frosted glass content cards,
  translucent nav/CTA with backdrop blur, Stripe/Apple keynote feel

Classic — Editorial elegance: ornamental inset border frame on title
  slide, round dot bullets with hairline separators, corner accent
  ornaments, full-width h2 rules, The Economist/print magazine feel

Minimal — Swiss/Japanese design: 200-weight 5em title, extreme
  whitespace (160px padding), nearly invisible dash bullets, no accent
  bars or underlines, left-aligned title slide, Muji/Dieter Rams feel

Bold — Full-bleed color title slide: primary color fills entire title
  with white text + text-shadow, dark vignette overlay, 5em h1, 8px
  chunky accent bars, colored closing slide with glass CTA, Nike/TED feel

Base improvements: smoother slideIn animation (translateY + subtle scale),
  refined typography spacing, larger agent avatars, better responsive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Bold full-page layout, Modern bg-photo visibility, logo filter

3 critical bugs fixed:

1. Bold title slide only showing quarter-page: removed errant
   `position:relative` that overrode `position:absolute;inset:0`
   from the base slide system

2. Modern preset hid background photos: `>*{z-index:1}` selectors
   were catching `.bg-overlay` div, overriding its `position:absolute`
   and collapsing it to zero height. Changed to `>*:not(.bg-overlay)`
   in Modern, Classic, and Bold presets

3. Bold logo invisible: `brightness(0) invert(1)` destroyed colored
   logos. Changed to `brightness(1.8) saturate(0)` — brightens and
   desaturates to near-white without destroying the image

Also raised default background opacity from 8% to 15% so images are
actually visible out of the box.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: background generation + 6 layout types for presentations

- Split edge function into Phase 1 (fast return) + Phase 2 (background)
  - Phase 1: auth, validate, create row (status='generating'), self-call, return immediately
  - Phase 2: Claude API call, build HTML, save (status='ready')
  - No more frontend timeouts — generation runs in separate execution
- Teach Claude 6 distinct slide layout types via system prompt:
  default bullets, two-column, stats row, quote, features grid, highlight
- Add CSS grid/flex for all new layout types with responsive breakpoints
- Extend all 4 style presets (Modern/Classic/Minimal/Bold) for new layouts
- Frontend polls every 3s for completion, shows building state
- Add status column to presentations table (generating/ready/failed)
- Bump max_tokens from 4096 to 6144 for richer HTML output
- Add staggered entrance animations for all new layout elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: improve text contrast across all presentation templates (WCAG AA)

- Dark mode mutedFg: #71717a → #a1a1aa (~6.6:1 contrast vs prev ~4:1)
- H3 category labels: use primary color in light mode (accent was too light)
- Classic preset: remove opacity:.7 on title subtitle
- Minimal preset: replace all opacity-based text dimming with solid WCAG-safe colors
- Bold preset: strengthen semi-transparent whites (.75→.92, .6→.85) on colored bgs
- Background images: add text-shadow safety net for readability over any photo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement Self-Improvement Loop for execution analysis

Implements autonomous self-improvement based on execution patterns:
- ExecutionAnalyzer: tracks history and identifies improvement opportunities
- ImprovementRiskAssessor: risk-based approval with conditions
- AutonomousImprover: applies low-risk improvements automatically
- HumanReviewQueue: manages pending improvements for human review
- SelfImprovingExecutionAgent: integrates improvement into execution loop

Improvement opportunities:
- PARAMETER_OPTIMIZATION: high retry ratio
- CONFIDENCE_BOOSTING: success with low confidence
- ERROR_PREVENTION: recurring errors
- FALLBACK_STRATEGY: low recipe confidence
- PERFORMANCE_IMPROVEMENT: slow execution
- RECIPE_SIMPLIFICATION: complex recipes
- RETRY_STRATEGY_UPDATE: success after retries

Risk levels:
- LOW: autonomous approval (parameter tuning, confidence boosting)
- MEDIUM: requires validation (error prevention, performance)
- HIGH: requires human approval (fallback strategy, step reordering)

Features:
- Pattern-based opportunity detection
- Condition-based approval logic
- Execution trend tracking
- Improvement metrics and reporting
- Human review queue with priority sorting

41 tests covering all functionality.

Add interactive Claude Code tutorial for Enterprise Architects

Introduces claude-code-tutorial.html — a fully self-contained, single-file
interactive tutorial covering 11 progressive sections on Claude Code:

1. What is Claude Code?
2. Writing Effective Prompts
3. Understanding Context Windows
4. Agentic Workflows
5. MCP Basics
6. Plan Mode & Execution Modes
7. Tools — Built-in Capabilities
8. Subagents
9. Choosing the Right Model
10. Plugins, Hooks & IDE Integration
11. What's Next (resources & closing)

Each section is gated behind a 3-question multiple choice quiz with
per-answer feedback and explanations for incorrect responses. Progress,
quiz answers, and scores persist in localStorage. Returning learners
skip the welcome screen and resume where they left off.

Design uses Lora + DM Sans + JetBrains Mono, a dark palette with warm
amber accent, and a fixed sidebar with unlock animations. No build step —
open directly in a browser.

Also updates CLAUDE.md to accurately reflect the final project state:
11 sections, quiz-based gating, actual state schema, concrete design
tokens, and updated acceptance criteria.

commit.message:
Fix node upgrade reconciler to maintain node count during rolling upgrade

Track InitialNodeCount in UpgradeGoal so the reconciler can detect
whether a pending replacement exists (total active > initial count).
Without this, after draining the first old node, the reconciler would
see the existing new-image node and try to drain the next old node
without launching a replacement first, reducing total node count.

commit.message:
Fix websockets: broadcast immediately with optimistic sender update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: inlining quirks, dead marker cleanup, and sidecar extension (#305)

* fix(selector): remove dead marker code for cross-file no-pseudo selectors

Cross-file component selectors without pseudo-classes (e.g. `& ${Child}`)
were generating unnecessary `defineMarker()` sidecars, unused named markers,
and unused `defaultMarker()` calls. These selectors are unconditional and
don't need the marker system — only pseudo-conditioned selectors like
`&:hover ${Child}` require `stylex.when.ancestor()` with markers.

Changes:
- Filter `ancestorSelectorParents` and `crossFileMarkers` to only include
  parents that actually have pseudo-conditioned overrides
- Exempt sibling selector parents from filtering since
  `stylex.when.siblingBefore()` always needs markers at runtime
- Bail when a bridge target component has no JSX usage in the file
- Rename cross-file sidecar files from .ts to .tsx to match input extension
- Remove now-unnecessary sidecar files for no-pseudo test cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always use .stylex.ts for sidecar files regardless of input extension

Reverts the .ts/.tsx extension matching for sidecars. Sidecar files contain
only TypeScript (marker exports, no JSX), so .ts is always correct. Mixing
extensions would create a migration hazard: stale .stylex.ts files from
previous runs shadow newly written .stylex.tsx files because TypeScript
resolves .ts before .tsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix inlining and other quirks

* ref: deduplicate CSS_IMPORT_ALLOWED_FIXTURES and extract buildBooleanVariantPropsSet helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restrict singleton truthy folding to boolean props without callsite visibility

Non-boolean single-variant props (e.g., direction="column") were incorrectly
emitted as `prop ? styles.x : undefined` when callsite visibility was
incomplete. This truthy guard matches any truthy value, so an external caller
passing `direction="row"` would also apply the "column" styles.

Now only boolean props use the truthy-conditional path without complete callsite
visibility. Non-boolean props fall through to a keyed variant lookup, which is
semantically correct for any value.

Addresses review comment on PR #305.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: emit equality check for single-key non-boolean variants instead of variant object

For single-key string variants (e.g., `direction="column"`), the codemod now
emits `direction === "column" && styles.cardDirection` in the main styles
object instead of creating a separate `cardDirectionVariants` stylex.create()
object. This is simpler, produces fewer style objects, and correctly types
the prop as a string literal (`"column"`) instead of `keyof typeof variants`.

Boolean single-key variants continue to use the truthy guard path as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: cleanup stale JSDoc, remove duplicate constant, improve variant style key naming

- Remove stale JSDoc comments on `isBooleanVariantKeyTrue` and `buildStaticVariantPropTypes`
- Remove duplicate inline `CSS_IMPORT_ALLOWED_FIXTURES` (use module-level constant)
- Include variant value in style key for non-boolean single-key variants
  (e.g., `cardDirectionColumn` instead of `cardDirection`)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use light DMG background for readable icon labels

Dark backgrounds cause macOS Finder to pick ambiguous text colors.
Light background ensures dark text labels are always readable.

commit.message:
Prove T_eq uniqueness, correct hGradBound independence, fix unused simp args

- Add equilibriumMaxwellian_T_unique (Defs.lean): temperature uniquely determined
  by Maxwellian via rpow injectivity at v=0
- Add CoulombConcreteTheorem42_unique_T: strengthened conclusion with T uniqueness
- Correct false claim: hGradBound is NOT derivable from hSchwartz + hExpDecay
  (counterexample: f(v) = exp(-|v|²)(2+sin(exp(⟨v⟩))))
- Fix 8 unused simp args in Defs.lean (zero warnings remaining)
- Replace deprecated integral_mul_right with integral_mul_const
- Update critique.md (cycle 61), LOG.md, progress.md
- Add plan.md for persistent planning across cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
